findings.reason: The RISC-V trace-column module retains legacy AIR layout and construction responsibilities in one file.
findings.next_extraction: Separate the next stable trace-layout responsibility from trace population after shared Cairo and prover boundaries settle.

findings.reason: The RISC-V infrastructure trace retains multiple legacy construction stages in one module.
findings.next_extraction: Extract the next independently specified infrastructure table with component-level tests in the RISC-V migration phase.

findings.reason: The RISC-V prover still combines statement construction, trace planning, and backend-neutral proof orchestration.
findings.next_extraction: Split statement and column planning from proof orchestration behind explicit frontend contracts.

findings.reason: The RISC-V runner trace module retains several legacy execution-to-witness transformations.
findings.next_extraction: Separate the next witness table transformation behind an explicit runner trace contract.

findings.reason: Legacy source-layout debt present when the conformance ratchet was introduced.
findings.next_extraction: Classify and extract the next responsibility named by the remediation plan.

findings.reason: A legacy RISC-V benchmark executable remains in the src root instead of its responsibility directory.
findings.next_extraction: Move the executable root under src/tools/riscv during the RISC-V migration and preserve its installed command contract.

findings.reason: A legacy RISC-V Metal benchmark executable remains in the src root instead of its responsibility directory.
findings.next_extraction: Move the executable root under src/tools/riscv and keep Metal selection at the integration boundary.

findings.reason: A legacy RISC-V prover test root remains mixed with library entry points in src.
findings.next_extraction: Move the test root under src/tests/riscv and preserve backend differential coverage.

findings.reason: A legacy RISC-V trace executable remains in the src root instead of its responsibility directory.
findings.next_extraction: Move the executable root under src/tools/riscv with trace artifact policy isolated from the frontend.
